analysis.reasoning: Core message: A diplomatic welcome to the Dominican Republic’s new UN Permanent Representative, expressing that China values bilateral ties and Security Council cooperation, and looks forward to strengthening cooperation at the UN. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes, the tweet emphasizes cooperation, multilateral engagement at the UN/Security Council, and positive bilateral relations—framing China as cooperative and constructive internationally. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; no mention of China’s political system or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not applicable; no claims about domestic achievements or leadership superiority. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
